description:
You are an online merchant who works from home. You want to start the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine that is already configured in your wger application, but you only have a pair of dumbbells at home. Find an exercise in the wger database that targets the Biceps (Biceps brachii) and requires Dumbbells. In the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine, create a new training day named 'Pull Day' and add the selected exercise to it with 3 sets of 12 repetitions.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: adminadmin
- App URL: http://localhost
